name: sales
description: Sales productivity plugin for Roots.Tech — Thai Odoo ERP implementation firm. Prospect, prep for calls, analyze requirements, manage pipeline, and prepare government bids. Based on Anthropic's official sales plugin, extended with Odoo-specific skills, Thai market context, and Google Workspace connectors. Includes TOR Response Factory (9 skills + 2 agents + 10 registers) for government bid compliance, scoring matrix optimization, and G0–G6 gate-enforced pipeline. v3.1.0 adds live Odoo CE CRM/Sales integration via odoorpc-cli; v3.2.0 adds a 3-mode live sales dashboard; v3.3.0 adds the odoo-editions knowledge reference; v3.4.0 adds the Roots & BEECY brand CI reference; v3.5.0 adds the deck-builder skill that generates on-brand presentations (Interactive HTML or pptx for Google Slides).
